creator: alex@big.endian.de
text:
Also sprach domi@saargate.de (domi@saargate.de):

> --- rand.old/pkg/PLIST	Sun Jan  2 13:13:53 2000
> +++ rand/pkg/PLIST	Sun Jan  2 13:07:39 2000
> @@ -1 +1,2 @@
>  bin/rand
> +man/man1/rand.1.gz
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

Hello!

Don't put man-pages into PLIST. Use MAN1 in the makefile instead.

Alex
